title: Iberian Jamon Penne Pasta
description: A simple yet flavorful Spanish-inspired pasta dish featuring iberico jamon.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil.
Cook the penne pasta according to the package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, heat the con (olive oil) over medium heat.
Add the catalan (garlic) and sauté for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the iberico jamon and cook for an additional 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Drain the cooked penne pasta and add it to the skillet with the jamon mixture.
Toss the pasta and jamon together to combine.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
